title: Smooth Quartz
description: Don't like those quartz textures from vanilla Minecraft ? This is for you !
body:
How to install the resource pack ?
> Download and copy the zip file to this direction
----------------------------------------------------------------------
C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks
----------------------------------------------------------------------
